mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_no, name, gender, phone, email, address, department_id, position_id, job_title_id, hire_date, status, resign_date, created_at, updated_at FROM employee WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo} AND status = '在职'

SELECT id, employee_no, name, gender, phone, email, address, department_id, position_id, job_title_id, hire_date, status, resign_date, created_at, updated_at FROM employee WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo} AND status = '在职'

SELECT id, employee_no, name, gender, phone, email, address, department_id, position_id, job_title_id, hire_date, status, resign_date, created_at, updated_at FROM employee WHERE id = #{id} AND status = '在职'
mapper.sql: e.id, e.employee_no, e.name, e.gender, e.phone, e.email, e.address, e.department_id, d.department_name, e.position_id, p.position_name, e.job_title_id, jt.title_name, e.hire_date, e.status, e.resign_date, s.base_salary, s.allowance, s.effective_date

FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.id LEFT JOIN job_title jt ON e.job_title_id = jt.id LEFT JOIN employee_salary s ON e.id = s.employee_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee ( employee_no, name, gender, phone, email, address, department_id, position_id, job_title_id, hire_date, status ) VALUES ( #{employeeNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}, #{departmentId}, #{positionId}, #{jobTitleId}, #{hireDate}, COALESCE(#{status}, '在职') )
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, address = #{address}, department_id = #{departmentId}, position_id = #{positionId}, job_title_id = #{jobTitleId}, hire_date = #{hireDate}, status = #{status}, resign_date = #{resignDate} WHERE id = #{id}
